_comment: Email broadcast list. The daily orchestrator sends each new edition to every subscriber whose status is 'active'. Add new subscribers by appending objects to the array — no schema migration needed.
_how_to_add: 1. Append { email, name, joined_at, status: 'active' } to the array
3. The next cron run picks up the new list automatically
4. Set status: 'unsubscribed' instead of deleting — preserves history
